description: Reviewed candidate list for the next compile-only firmware targets (FW-COMPILE-EXPAND-001). This file is a planning / readiness-tracking document only: it does NOT add any compile-only target, does NOT add any product YAML, does NOT add any WebFlash wrapper, does NOT add any entry to config/webflash-builds.json, does NOT set webflash_build_matrix or artifact_name on any product, does NOT promote any product to preview / stable, does NOT build or attach any firmware artifact, does NOT import to WebFlash, and does NOT claim hardware proof exists or that RELEASE-007 is unblocked. The source-of-truth compile-only lane remains config/compile-only-targets.json; this file is a separate planning ledger. See docs/compile-only-expansion-candidates.md.

candidates.use_case: Minimum POE-powered Ceiling Core build without AirIQ / VentIQ / RoomIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Already exists in the compile-only lane (FW-COMPILE-POE-NONFAN-001 / PR #548). The package composition is a strict subset of the proven Release-One YAML (products/webflash/ceiling-poe-ventiq-roomiq.yaml). Promotion to a full product-catalog YAML remains blocked behind PRODUCT-POE-410-001 / S360-410 schematic_status: verified / Release-One PoE caveat closure / product-onboarding approval.
candidates.notes: Already compile-only as of PR #548 — listed here to anchor the ranking. This candidate file does NOT re-add the compile-only target.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + RoomIQ without VentIQ / AirIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Already exists in the compile-only lane (PR #548). RoomIQ (comfort_ceiling + presence_ceiling) subset is already proven to compose by Release-One. Same product-yaml chain as Ceiling-POE.
candidates.notes: Already compile-only as of PR #548.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + VentIQ (bathroom air-quality) without RoomIQ / AirIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Already exists in the compile-only lane (PR #548). VentIQ (airiq_bathroom_base + bathroom_profile) subset is already proven to compose by Release-One.
candidates.notes: Already compile-only as of PR #548.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + AirIQ (general air-quality) without VentIQ / RoomIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Already exists in the compile-only lane (PR #548). AirIQ composition (airiq_ceiling + airiq_basic_profile) is proven expressible by products/sense360-core-ceiling.yaml. AirIQ and VentIQ are mutually exclusive.
candidates.notes: Already compile-only as of PR #548.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + AirIQ + RoomIQ without VentIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Already exists in the compile-only lane (PR #548). AirIQ + comfort + presence composition is proven expressible by products/sense360-core-ceiling.yaml.
candidates.notes: Already compile-only as of PR #548.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + LED ring without AirIQ / VentIQ / RoomIQ / fan. Compile-only preview only.
candidates.reason: POE non-fan with LED is the next-lowest-risk LED preview compile-only candidate. The LED ring (S360-300) is already schematic_status: verified, but the LED stable gauntlet (S360-300-BENCH-001, WF-HW-TEST-001, WF-HW-TEST-003, RELEASE-007) is open, so this candidate can only ever be compile-only preview confidence, NOT LED stable promotion. Package composition mirrors Ceiling-POE plus the existing ceiling_halo_leds.yaml feature already consumed by Release-One LED preview (products/webflash/ceiling-poe-ventiq-roomiq-led.yaml).
blockers: S360-300-BENCH-001 (only blocks LED stable, NOT compile-only preview)
candidates.notes: Compile-only preview ONLY. Adding this target must NOT promote LED to stable, must NOT add a webflash_wrapper, must NOT flip webflash_build_matrix, must NOT add an artifact_name, and must NOT claim S360-300-BENCH-001 / RELEASE-007 are closed.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + RoomIQ + LED ring without VentIQ / AirIQ / fan. Compile-only preview only.
candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-POE-RoomIQ plus LED. Same Release-One-mirrored package composition; LED stable gauntlet remains open so this is compile-only preview only.
blockers: S360-300-BENCH-001 (only blocks LED stable, NOT compile-only preview)
candidates.notes: Compile-only preview ONLY. Adding this target must NOT promote LED to stable.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + VentIQ + LED ring without RoomIQ / AirIQ / fan. Compile-only preview only.
candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-POE-VentIQ plus LED.
blockers: S360-300-BENCH-001 (only blocks LED stable, NOT compile-only preview)
candidates.notes: Compile-only preview ONLY. Adding this target must NOT promote LED to stable.

candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-POE-AirIQ plus LED.
blockers: S360-300-BENCH-001 (only blocks LED stable, NOT compile-only preview)
candidates.notes: Compile-only preview ONLY. Adding this target must NOT promote LED to stable.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + AirIQ + RoomIQ + LED ring without VentIQ / fan. Compile-only preview only.
candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-POE-AirIQ-RoomIQ plus LED.
blockers: S360-300-BENCH-001 (only blocks LED stable, NOT compile-only preview)
candidates.notes: Compile-only preview ONLY. Adding this target must NOT promote LED to stable.

candidates.use_case: USB-powered Ceiling Core build without AirIQ / VentIQ / RoomIQ / fan / LED. USB family is not opened yet.
candidates.reason: No S360-* USB PSU board exists in config/hardware-catalog.json; USB on S360-100 is debug-only. There is no PACKAGE-USB-* / PRODUCT-USB-* / WEBFLASH-USB-* / RELEASE-USB-* chain. Before USB compile-only can land, a USB-family product-onboarding scope decision and a packages/hardware/power_usb.yaml (or equivalent) must exist.
candidates.notes: USB non-fan ranks ahead of all blocked Fan / PWR lanes because the USB-family chain is opened-once, not gated on compliance or core-bus rebinds. Once a USB-family scope decision and a package exist, this becomes the simplest compile-only candidate to add.

candidates.use_case: USB-powered Ceiling Core + RoomIQ without VentIQ / AirIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Authored as a manual / custom product by V1-R4-CREATE-004 (products/sense360-ceiling-usb-roomiq.yaml shim + products/bundles/ceiling-usb-roomiq.yaml bundle) and registered as the compile-only target ceiling-usb-roomiq-product-compile-only (pending-ci). USB power-axis variant of the authored Ceiling-POE-RoomIQ; Core (S360-100) + RoomIQ (S360-200) boards verified, no USB PSU board (no S360-410), no evidence blocker. The remaining blockers gate WebFlash / release promotion only, not manual authoring.
candidates.notes: Authored manual / custom by V1-R4-CREATE-004 and now listed in currently_compile_only_config_strings; NOT WebFlash-exposed (no artifact_name, no webflash_wrapper, no config/webflash-builds.json row, no kit preset). compile_validation_status of the registered compile-only target is pending-ci; a CI --compile run is owed.

candidates.use_case: USB-powered Ceiling Core + VentIQ without RoomIQ / AirIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-USB plus VentIQ.
candidates.notes: Same USB-family prerequisites as Ceiling-USB.

candidates.use_case: USB-powered Ceiling Core + AirIQ without VentIQ / RoomIQ / fan / LED.
candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-USB plus AirIQ.
candidates.notes: Same USB-family prerequisites as Ceiling-USB.

candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-USB-AirIQ plus RoomIQ.
candidates.notes: Same USB-family prerequisites as Ceiling-USB.

candidates.use_case: USB-powered Ceiling Core + VentIQ + RoomIQ without AirIQ / fan / LED. The USB analogue of Release-One.
candidates.reason: Authored as a manual / custom product by V1-R4-CREATE-004 (products/sense360-ceiling-usb-ventiq-roomiq.yaml shim + products/bundles/ceiling-usb-ventiq-roomiq.yaml bundle) and registered as the compile-only target ceiling-usb-ventiq-roomiq-product-compile-only (pending-ci). USB power-axis variant of the WebFlash-shipping Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ; Core (S360-100) + VentIQ (S360-211) + RoomIQ (S360-200) boards verified, no USB PSU board (no S360-410), no evidence blocker. The remaining blockers gate WebFlash / release promotion only, not manual authoring.
candidates.notes: Authored manual / custom by V1-R4-CREATE-004 and now listed in currently_compile_only_config_strings; NOT WebFlash-exposed (no artifact_name, no webflash_wrapper, no config/webflash-builds.json row, no kit preset). compile_validation_status of the registered compile-only target is pending-ci; a CI --compile run is owed.

candidates.reason: Sibling of Ceiling-USB plus LED. Requires both the USB-family chain to open and the LED-preview compile-only stance.

candidates.use_case: Mains-powered (PWR / 240V) Ceiling Core build. Representative deferral row for the entire PWR / S360-400 lane (56 matrix rows).
candidates.reason: PWR / S360-400 is mains-voltage. COMPLIANCE-001 is CLOSED, resolved by market posture per COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001 (S360-400 is never placed on the market; self-build open-source only — docs/decisions/COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001.md), so the gate citation is now that record's experimental-lane preconditions; the deferral behaviour is unchanged. The entire PACKAGE-POWER-400-001 / PRODUCT-POWER-400-001 / WEBFLASH-POWER-400-001 / RELEASE-POWER-400-001 chain is in docs-only deferral state. The S360-400 row in config/hardware-catalog.json stays schematic_status: cataloged_unverified and is asserted unverified by tests/test_hardware_catalog.py::EXPECTED_STILL_UNVERIFIED_SKUS. Adding any PWR compile-only target would imply mains-voltage compile confidence that the recorded evidence has not granted. Do NOT add any PWR compile-only target until a deliberate, human-reviewed PR satisfies the COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001 experimental-lane preconditions for S360-400 (PACKAGE-POWER-400-001-class bench protocol with signed attestation) and the PACKAGE-POWER-400-001 implementation slice lands.
candidates.notes: Representative deferral row for the 56-row PWR lane (Ceiling-PWR plus 55 variants). Do NOT enumerate individual PWR-bearing candidates as compile-only-safe; all 56 are deferred under the same compliance / package / product / webflash / release chain.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + FanRelay control. Representative deferral row for the entire FanRelay lane (36 matrix rows).
candidates.reason: FanRelay (S360-310) is blocked by both PACKAGE-RELAY-001 (deferred until CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001A + S360-100-BENCH-001 silkscreen + K1 BOM + harness evidence) and CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001A / CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001C (relay_pin -> GPIO3 rebind requires GPIO3 to be freed by 001C first; ESP32-S3 GPIO3 strap-pin bench characterisation outstanding). Adding a compile-only FanRelay target would either pin schematic-conflicting pin values or pre-commit an undecided rebind.
candidates.notes: Representative deferral row for the 36-row FanRelay lane (POE + USB + PWR variants). Carries blocked-package and blocked-core-bus blockers.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + FanPWM (PWM fan driver). Representative row for the entire FanPWM lane (36 matrix rows).
candidates.reason: PACKAGE-PWM-001-IMPLEMENT-001 / PR #590 reconciled the FanPWM package to the PWM-drive-only scope (four independent SX1509 PWM-drive fan controllers; canonical packages/expansions/fan_pwm.yaml composing the neutral binding packages/expansions/fan_pwm_sx1509.yaml; no pulse_counter, no RPM, TachIO/GPIO16 reserved) and CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001B landed the core_i2c bus the SX1509 expander binds. FW-COMPILE-PWM-001 adds ONE compile-only validation target for Ceiling-POE-FanPWM (products/compile-only/ceiling-poe-fanpwm.yaml) that exercises the PWM-drive-only package syntax / substitutions / includes. The broader FanPWM lane stays deferred: no PRODUCT-PWM-001 product YAML exists, S360-311 schematic_status stays cataloged_unverified, and the bench gates (PWM polarity; per-fan / aggregate current + thermal envelope) plus the optional future RPM strategy (COMPONENT-SX1509-TACH-001 or a bench-confirmed TachIO follow-up) remain open. compile_only_safe stays false at the lane level — a single validation target is not lane-wide compile-only readiness, and the target's compile result stays pending until CI runs --compile.
candidates.notes: Representative row for the 36-row FanPWM lane. FW-COMPILE-PWM-001 adds ONE compile-only validation target (config string Ceiling-POE-FanPWM, now listed in currently_compile_only_config_strings) and does NOT add a product YAML, WebFlash exposure, or release artifact, does NOT claim RPM support, and does NOT claim compile success until CI runs the --compile lane. Carries blocked-package / blocked-core-bus history; the lane stays deferred pending PRODUCT-PWM-001 and the S360-311 bench gates.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + FanDAC (GP8403 DAC fan driver). Representative row for the entire FanDAC lane (24 matrix rows).
candidates.reason: PACKAGE-DAC-001 / PR #573 implemented the FanDAC package at the package layer (two GP8403 chips / four neutral outputs) and CORE-ABSTRACT-BUS-001B landed the core_i2c bus the GP8403 I2C peripheral binds. FW-COMPILE-DAC-001 adds ONE compile-only validation target for Ceiling-POE-FanDAC (products/compile-only/ceiling-poe-fandac.yaml) and fixes the gp8403 voltage substitutions from the invalid ESPHome enum string '0-10V' to the valid '10V' (customer-facing 0-10V). The broader FanDAC lane stays deferred: no PRODUCT-DAC-001 product YAML exists and S360-312 BOM evidence is still missing. FanDAC + AirIQ is forbidden by the grammar (12 rows excluded from the matrix), so this lane carries 24 rows. compile_only_safe stays false at the lane level — a single validation target is not lane-wide compile-only readiness.
candidates.notes: Representative row for the 24-row FanDAC lane. FW-COMPILE-DAC-001 adds ONE compile-only validation target (config string Ceiling-POE-FanDAC, now listed in currently_compile_only_config_strings) and does NOT add a product YAML, WebFlash exposure, or release artifact, and does NOT claim compile success until CI runs the --compile lane. Carries blocked-package / blocked-core-bus history; the lane stays deferred pending PRODUCT-DAC-001 and S360-312 BOM evidence.

candidates.use_case: POE-powered Ceiling Core + FanTRIAC (TRIAC mains fan driver). Representative deferral row for the entire FanTRIAC lane (36 matrix rows).
candidates.reason: FanTRIAC (S360-320) switches a mains-voltage load. This representative lane row stays deferred: PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 remains open until the signed operator attestation is committed, and COMPLIANCE-001 is CLOSED by market posture per COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001 (S360-320 is never placed on the market; docs/decisions/COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001.md), so the compliance citation is now that record's experimental-lane preconditions. (The dedicated full-composition target Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-FanTRIAC-RoomIQ in config/compile-only-targets.json is the one sanctioned FanTRIAC buildability target; this 36-row lane stays closed.) Do NOT add any further FanTRIAC compile-only target until the commissioning PR lands the signed PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 attestation and deliberately moves FanTRIAC into the experimental lane.
candidates.notes: Representative deferral row for the 36-row FanTRIAC lane. Carries blocked-hardware and blocked-compliance blockers.
